title: GMS Week 14 - HOLIDAY SEASON!
summary:
Main
With holidays underway across much of the world, it has been a far quieter week in terms of sales & activity, whilst sentimentsand pricing remain further muted as a result. Several vessels have arrived in Bangladesh for delivery this week despite it taking much longer these days to get the L/Cs in order. As such, to have smooth boardings & beachings, it is therefore recommended to maintain at least five days prior arrival, in order to allow for local Buyers L/Cs to open, release, and be credited to Owners / Cash Buyers before vessels can beach.
